test-case.description: returns the correct number of findings
test-case.name: Normalize-ADOConnections.v3 schema conversion.returns the correct number of findings
Normalize-ADOConnections.v3 schema conversion.sets SchemaVersion to 2.0
Normalize-ADOConnections.v3 schema conversion.sets Source to ado-connections
Normalize-ADOConnections.v3 schema conversion.sets Platform to ADO
Normalize-ADOConnections.v3 schema conversion.sets EntityType to ServiceConnection
Normalize-ADOConnections.CanonicalId normalization.lowercases EntityId
Normalize-ADOConnections.CanonicalId normalization.has ado:// prefix in EntityId
Normalize-ADOConnections.CanonicalId normalization.includes org/project/serviceconnection/name in EntityId
Normalize-ADOConnections.Service Connection category.sets Category to Service Connection
Normalize-ADOConnections.field preservation.all findings are compliant (inventory mode)
Normalize-ADOConnections.field preservation.all findings have Info severity
Normalize-ADOConnections.field preservation.preserves Title
Normalize-ADOConnections.field preservation.preserves Detail with auth info

test-case.name: Normalize-ADOConnections.error handling.returns empty array for null Findings

Normalize-ADOConnections.error handling.handles missing optional fields gracefully

ConvertTo-MaskedId.returns null inputs as null

Invoke-WithRetry.retries retryable failures

test-case.description: captures tool failures without crashing the pool
